## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? One or two sentences is fine. -->

## Changes

<!-- Bullet the user-visible or scientifically relevant changes. -->

## Validation

<!-- How was this verified? e.g. `python -m pytest` output, a dataset it was
     run against, before/after figures for GUI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test (or an explanation of why not)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed (`README.md`, `docs/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No absolute claims in docs/comments that the code can't guarantee
